description: Install ESLint 9 and typescript-eslint. Create eslint.config.js using flat config format with typescript-eslint strict ruleset. Add lint and lint:fix scripts. Ignore build/, node_modules/, coverage/. Ensure no conflicts with Prettier. Zero errors on source files required.
title: Add ESLint 9 flat config with typescript-eslint strict

descriptionHistory.description: Install ESLint 9 and typescript-eslint. Create eslint.config.js using flat config format with typescript-eslint strict ruleset. Add lint and lint:fix scripts. Ignore build/, node_modules/, coverage/. Ensure no conflicts with Prettier. Zero errors on source files required.

summary:
## Summary: Install ESLint 9 and typescript-eslint. Create eslint.config.js

### Changes Implemented
- No new changes were needed — the feature was already fully implemented in a prior commit

### Files Modified
- `eslint.config.js` — already exists with flat config format, `tseslint.configs.strict`, `eslint-config-prettier` integration, and correct ignores (`build/`, `node_modules/`, `coverage/`)
- `package.json` — `lint` and `lint:fix` scripts already present; ESLint 9, typescript-eslint, @eslint/js, and eslint-config-prettier already in devDependencies

### Acceptance Criteria Verification
- [x] ESLint 9 installed (`eslint@^9.39.3` in devDependencies)
- [x] typescript-eslint installed (`typescript-eslint@^8.56.1`, `@eslint/js@^9.39.3`)
- [x] `eslint.config.js` uses flat config format (`tseslint.config(...)`)
- [x] typescript-eslint strict ruleset (`...tseslint.configs.strict`)
- [x] `lint` script: `eslint src`
- [x] `lint:fix` script: `eslint src --fix`
- [x] Ignores: `build/`, `node_modules/`, `coverage/`
- [x] No Prettier conflicts (`eslint-config-prettier` applied as final config)
- [x] Zero errors: `pnpm run lint` exits 0

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- Build fails with `TS2339: Property 'withBranch' does not exist on type 'GitOperations'` — this is a pre-existing TypeScript error tracked under `feature-1772348821661`, completely unrelated to this ESLint feature

### Learnings
- The project already had ESLint fully wired up; this feature was completed in a previous session

### Notes for Developer
- The `eslint.config.js` includes a special rule block for test files that turns off `@typescript-eslint/no-non-null-assertion` (test assertions commonly need this)
- `eslint-config-prettier` is applied last as required to ensure Prettier wins any style conflicts

### Verification Status
- `pnpm run lint` exits 0 with no warnings or errors
- Playwright verification not applicable — tooling/config feature with no UI or runtime behavior
